# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

const MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH = 1024 * 1024; // 1MB max content size
const MAX_CHUNK_SIZE = 8192; // 8KB chunks
const ALLOWED_HEADER_NAMES = new Set([
  'content-type',
  'cache-control',
  'x-custom-header',
  'x-request-id',
  'accept',
  'accept-language',
  'content-language',
]);

const FORBIDDEN_HEADER_VALUES_PATTERN = /[\r\n\x00]/;

function sanitizeHeaderValue(value: string): string {
  return value.replace(/[\r\n\x00]/g, '').trim();
}

function isAllowedContentType(contentType: string): boolean {
  const allowed = [
    'text/plain',
    'text/html',
    'application/json',
    'text/csv',
    'application/xml',
    'text/xml',
    'application/octet-stream',
  ];
  const normalized = contentType.toLowerCase().split(';')[0].trim();
  return allowed.some((type) => normalized === type);
}

function validateAndSanitizeHeaders(
  userHeaders: Record<string, string>
): Record<string, string> {
  const sanitized: Record<string, string> = {};

  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(userHeaders)) {
    const lowerKey = key.toLowerCase().trim();

    if (!ALLOWED_HEADER_NAMES.has(lowerKey)) {
      continue;
    }

    if (typeof value !== 'string') {
      continue;
    }

    if (FORBIDDEN_HEADER_VALUES_PATTERN.test(value)) {
      continue;
    }

    const sanitizedValue = sanitizeHeaderValue(value);

    if (sanitizedValue.length > 512) {
      continue;
    }

    if (lowerKey === 'content-type' && !isAllowedContentType(sanitizedValue)) {
      continue;
    }

    sanitized[lowerKey] = sanitizedValue;
  }

  return sanitized;
}

function validateContent(content: unknown): string {
  if (content === null || content === undefined) {
    throw new Error('Content is required');
  }

  let contentStr: string;

  if (typeof content === 'string') {
    contentStr = content;
  } else if (typeof content === 'object') {
    try {
      contentStr = JSON.stringify(content);
    } catch {
      throw new Error('Content could not be serialized');
    }
  } else {
    contentStr = String(content);
  }

  if (contentStr.length === 0) {
    throw new Error('Content must not be empty');
  }

  if (new TextEncoder().encode(contentStr).length > MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH) {
    throw new Error(`Content exceeds maximum size of ${MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH} bytes`);
  }

  return contentStr;
}

export default async function handler(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  if (request.method !== 'POST') {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Method not allowed. Use POST.' }),
      {
        status: 405,
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          Allow: 'POST',
        },
      }
    );
  }

  const contentType = request.headers.get('content-type') || '';
  if (!contentType.includes('application/json')) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Content-Type must be application/json' }),
      {
        status: 415,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }
    );
  }

  const contentLength = request.headers.get('content-length');
  if (contentLength && parseInt(contentLength, 10) > MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Request body too large' }),
      {
        status: 413,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }
    );
  }

  let body: { content?: unknown; headers?: unknown };

  try {
    const rawBody = await request.text();

    if (new TextEncoder().encode(rawBody).length > MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Request body too large' }),
        {
          status: 413,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        }
      );
    }

    body = JSON.parse(rawBody);
  } catch {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid JSON in request body' }),
      {
        status: 400,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }
    );
  }

  if (typeof body !== 'object' || body === null || Array.isArray(body)) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Request body must be a JSON object' }),
      {
        status: 400,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }
    );
  }

  let validatedContent: string;
  try {
    validatedContent = validateContent(body.content);
  } catch (err) {
    const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Invalid content';
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: message }),
      {
        status: 400,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      }
    );
  }

  let responseHeaders: Record<string, string> = {};

  if (body.headers !== undefined) {
    if (
      typeof body.headers !== 'object' ||
      body.headers === null ||
      Array.isArray(body.headers)
    ) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Headers must be a plain object with string values' }),
        {
          status: 400,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        }
      );
    }

    responseHeaders = validateAndSanitizeHeaders(
      body.headers as Record<string, string>
    );
  }

  const encoder = new TextEncoder();
  const contentBytes = encoder.encode(validatedContent);

  const stream = new ReadableStream({
    start(controller) {
      let offset = 0;

      function pushChunk() {
        if (offset >= contentBytes.length) {
          controller.close();
          return;
        }

        const end = Math.min(offset + MAX_CHUNK_SIZE, contentBytes.length);
        const chunk = contentBytes.slice(offset, end);
        controller.enqueue(chunk);
        offset = end;

        // Use setTimeout to yield control and simulate streaming
        setTimeout(pushChunk, 0);
      }

      pushChunk();
    },
    cancel() {
      // Stream was cancelled by the client - nothing to clean up
    },
  });

  const finalHeaders = new Headers();

  // Set security headers first
  finalHeaders.set('X-Content-Type-Options', 'nosniff');
  finalHeaders.set('X-Frame-Options', 'DENY');
  finalHeaders.set('Referrer-Policy', 'no-referrer');
  finalHeaders.set('X-XSS-Protection', '1; mode=block');
  finalHeaders.set(
    'Content-Security-Policy',
    "default-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'"
  );
  finalHeaders.set('Transfer-Encoding', 'chunked');

  // Set default content type
  if (!responseHeaders['content-type']) {
    finalHeaders.set('Content-Type', 'text/plain; charset=utf-8');
  }

  // Apply user-provided (sanitized) headers
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(responseHeaders)) {
    // Don't allow overriding security headers
    const securityHeaders = [
      'x-content-type-options',
      'x-frame-options',
      'referrer-policy',
      'x-xss-protection',
      'content-security-policy',
      'transfer-encoding',
    ];
    if (!securityHeaders.includes(key.toLowerCase())) {
      finalHeaders.set(key, value);
    }
  }

  return new Response(stream, {
    status: 200,
    headers: finalHeaders,
  });
}
